---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or change
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem this solves**

The pain point or gap you have today.

**Proposed approach**

What the change would look like from a user perspective.

**Alternatives considered**

Other approaches you thought about and why they didn't fit.

**Additional context**

Anything else, links, prior art, related issues.
